allOf.query: [format('Perf | where ObjectName == "Processor" and CounterName == "% Processor Time" | where InstanceName == "_Total" | summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | where AggregatedValue > {0}', parameters('cpuThreshold'))]

[format('Perf | where ObjectName == "Memory" and CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use" | summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m) | where AggregatedValue > {0}', parameters('memoryThreshold'))]

[format('Perf | where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk" and CounterName == "% Free Space" | where InstanceName != "_Total" | summarize AggregatedValue = avg(CounterValue) by Computer, InstanceName, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m) | where AggregatedValue < {0}', sub(100, parameters('diskThreshold')))]

properties.description: Alert when VM stops sending heartbeat

allOf.query: Heartbeat | summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer | where LastHeartbeat < ago(10m)

properties.displayName: Deploy Azure Monitor Agent and associate with DCR
properties.description: Automatically deploy Azure Monitor Agent to VMs and associate them with the specified Data Collection Rule

metadata.description: Resource ID of the Data Collection Rule to associate with VMs
Enable or disable the execution of the policy

properties.description: Automatically installs Azure Monitor Agent and associates VMs with Data Collection Rule
